creditCards.name: Apple Card

rewardsRate.apple: 3% Daily Cash at Apple Store and select partners (Uber, Exxon, Walgreens, Nike, etc.)
rewardsRate.applePay: 2% Daily Cash on all Apple Pay purchases
rewardsRate.other: 1% Daily Cash on physical card purchases

benefits: No late fees or penalty rates
Daily Cash deposited to Apple Cash daily
Built-in spending tracker in Wallet app
Interest rate among the lowest available

creditCards.name: Target Circle Card

rewardsRate.target: 5% discount on eligible Target purchases (in-store and online)
rewardsRate.targetStarbucks: 5% discount at Starbucks inside Target stores

benefits: 5% off on top of Target Circle deals
Free 2-day shipping on many Target.com items

creditCards.name: PayPal Cashback Mastercard

rewardsRate.paypal: 3% cash back on all PayPal purchases
rewardsRate.all: 1.5% cash back everywhere Mastercard is accepted

benefits: Cash back redeemed to PayPal balance
Use rewards for PayPal purchases or transfer to bank
